reforms.description: The government has launched an evaluation of technology transfer offices to assess whether they require more powers to identify and encourage academic research with commercial potential.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing technology transfer can lead to increased commercialization of research, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is an evaluation rather than a direct funding or structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The government has launched an evaluation of policy promoting university-business linkages, including assessing whether technology transfer offices require more powers.

reforms.description: The government has increased support for research and development through the core programme, Skattefunn, which utilizes competitive tenders for distributing R&D support, and plans to introduce a funding mechanism based on multi-year performance agreements with higher education institutions to incentivize differentiation and quality improvement in education and research.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D funding and incentivizing performance can enhance innovation capacity and improve educational outcomes, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The funding mechanisms have been put into practice.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the funding structure for R&D and education.
reforms.source_quote: The government is particularly supportive of a system of multi-year performance agreements and will have a dialogue with the higher education institutions on the design of such agreements.

reforms.description: Norway's authorities are merging higher education institutions to address quality challenges and improve efficiency in the sector, aiming to reduce the number of institutions from 53 to 42 to enhance research capabilities and educational outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Merging institutions can lead to improved research capabilities and educational outcomes, fostering a more efficient and effective higher education system.
reforms.status_evidence: The merger of higher education institutions has been completed.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in the higher education landscape.
reforms.source_quote: As of January 2016, the total number of higher education institutions has been reduced from 53 to 42.
